name: Monitoring Role Report
description: Review watcher or automation alerts and produce a concise operator-facing report.

name: Incident Triage
description: Classify incoming incident signals and propose the next operator actions.

name: Research Intake
description: Prepare a reusable intake summary before deeper research work starts.

name: Release Checklist
description: Validate release readiness and stop at an explicit approval gate for production changes.

name: Code Review
description: Review a change set for correctness, regressions, missing tests, and operational risk.
